title: Update: Building collapse in Victoria Street
bodyText:
Update
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS & VIDEOS - Emergency workers are freeing the injured from the rubble of the collapsed multi-storey building that was under construction in Victoria Street in George.


> At this stage it is unknown how many people have been injured and if there are fatalities.


George Herald is at the scene.

Many local emergency services are involved in the rescue effort. Chaos has erupted in the immediate area with onlookers trying to get a glimpse of the disaster as rescue vehicles with blaring sirens blast up and down York Street.

More information will follow as soon as received.


> VIDEO: Kristy Kolberg is at the scene


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.


> VIDEO: CCTV footage of the moment the building in Victoria Street imploded


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
